description: Court rulings on candidate eligibility, party primaries, and election results 2023–2026. Partial.

data.case: Tinubu presidential qualification — certificate forgery allegation
data.court: Presidential Election Petition Tribunal → Court of Appeal → Supreme Court
data.outcome: Tinubu's election upheld at all levels. Allegations of false academic credentials dismissed.
data.significance: Established Tinubu's legal right to presidency despite ongoing public controversy

data.case: Obi/Labour Party petition — 2023 presidential election results
data.court: Presidential Election Petition Tribunal → Court of Appeal → Supreme Court
data.significance: Peter Obi challenged results; losing the case contributed to his party exit

gaps.note: Many state-level governorship petition rulings not documented here. Source: Nigerian Legal Information Institute (nigerialii.org) or court registry.
